issue_validation_scores.issue_description: The service description indicates a 'Deutschland-Ticket', which may have tax implications.
issue_validation_scores.judge_explanation: This issue is correctly categorized as a potential gross-up situation. The Deutschland-Ticket is a monthly public transportation pass, which could be considered under telecommunications/transportation expenses. According to the rules, "Phone/internet €20/month max tax-exempt, amounts above this limit are taxable." The monthly cost is €58, which exceeds the €20 tax-exempt limit, so gross-up is appropriate. The only minor issue is that the rule reference specifically mentions phone expenses, but this is a transportation ticket.
